name: Astro Racing
description: Blast off into space and race across 10 alien planets in Astro Racing! Pilot your spaceship through cosmic circuits, drift through space gravity, and hit warp boosts to surge ahead. Avoid ion clouds that flip your controls! Finish 1st to unlock the next planet. 10 planets, 5 laps each - from Luna Base to the legendary Warp Zone. Can you become the Intergalactic Champion?
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
